author: @osmbsmy.706
text: I work in manufacturing electronics, with not a speck of dirt to be found if we're doing things right, but we still use the phrases like "get our hands dirty" when it's time to hit the production floor and iterate on a process, fit check or testing.  There's something inherently pleasant in "rolling up your sleeves" and getting out of the theoretical phase of design.

author: @DKFX1
text: I think there's a distinction to be made between labour work as practiced today (9-5) and then work as you describe it, which usually involves artistic expression or interests.
